description: Address review findings: remove dead data exports, fix broken Chinese prompts, add search debounce, remove redundant category field, fix product nameZh English fallback, add build script tests.
steps: 1. Remove dead data exports (colors, typography) from barrel export and remove unused files from bundle.
2. Fix broken Chinese prompts in build-data.mjs - truncate at proper boundaries.
3. Add search debounce (150-300ms) to search input handlers.
4. Remove redundant category field from UIStyle interface and data.
5. Fix product nameZh English fallback - add comprehensive Chinese translations.
6. Add tests for the build script CSV parsing logic.
7. Ensure all changes pass build and tests with >= 90% coverage.
acceptance_criteria: colors and typography are not exported from barrel or bundled
Chinese prompts are proper sentences without truncated mid-word text
category field removed from UIStyle (only type remains)
All product nameZh values are in Chinese
Build script CSV parsing has test coverage
